## beehiiv posts aggregate-stats

Show aggregate statistics for posts

### Synopsis

Get aggregate stats

Retrieve aggregate stats for all posts

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/posts/aggregate_stats

```
beehiiv posts aggregate-stats [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv posts aggregate-stats
beehiiv posts stats
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help                help for aggregate-stats
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```
